text:
3 PRs merged this week to keep the digital garden growing. The big ones: Alibaba's Qwen models (text and vision) are now live on the API. Better yet, we put qwen-large and qwen-vision on the free tier because paywalls for good vision models are boring. Also, LND Ai just sprouted in the image generation greenhouse. Go build something weird with them. 🌱✨ docs are in the usual place.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #qwen #machinelearning #buildinpublic #generativeai
